summary: Neighbourhood-discovery app focused on Nairobi (and nearby metro areas) with neighbourhood cards and potential AI-generated summaries; user is expanding the list of neighbourhoods covered.
architectural_notes: Assistant does not have direct access to the app’s stored neighbourhood list; it can only use neighbourhoods provided in-chat unless integrated with the app data source.

existing_features.title: Expand the existing static neighbourhood catalog (frontend/src/data/neighbourhoodCatalog.ts) by adding additional major Nairobi and nearby metro neighbourhoods/areas, keeping the existing Neighbourhood shape (id, name, description, rentMin, rentMax, commuteNote, tags, imageFilename) and ensuring all entries have unique numeric IDs and no duplicate names.

new_feature_requests.summary: Expand the app’s neighbourhood coverage by adding other major neighbourhoods based on the already-existing neighbourhood set.
